rationale: The previous attempt asserted facts like `post1_self_.wf()` directly, but those are conjuncts of the antecedent `P` in the synthetic ensures `P ==> det_equal`, not body hypotheses — that's why z3 rejected the very first assertion. The fix is to case-split on `P` with an explicit `if (P) { ... }`: inside the branch every conjunct of `P` is in scope so the quantifier-instantiation work goes through, and outside the implication is vacuously true.
